findings.title: hasMore overfetch bug
findings.issue: Original code fetched limit+100 rows and used >= comparison for hasMore, producing unreliable pagination signals
findings.fix: Removed overfetch, changed to skills.length === limit (matching bulk-reprocess pattern)

findings.title: Incomplete in-progress states list
findings.issue: NON_TERMINAL_STATES only had 3 states, missing AUTO_APPROVED, ON_HOLD, RESCAN_REQUIRED
findings.fix: Expanded to 6 states covering all non-terminal submission states

findings.title: Blocklist filter applied in memory instead of DB
findings.issue: In-memory blocklist filter caused unreliable batch sizes and hasMore signal
findings.fix: Moved to Prisma name: { notIn: blockedNameList } filter
